titleStmt.title: SII 27.28: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 28. (A.R. No. 286 of 1935-36.) KUṄKANŪRU, PATTIKONDA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the Rāmaliṅgēśvara temple.

This record refers itself to the reign of Bhūlōkamalla ruling from Jayantīpura and registers grants of lands, flower-garden, and oilmill by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Sakaradēva-Chōḷa-mahārāja, son of Bhīmadēva, and manneya Mācharasa for the worship of and offerings to god Rāmēśvara of the ghaṭikāsthāna Kukuvanūra situated in Sauḷu70 of Naṟavāḍi-500 division. The grant was meant also for feeding the travellers. Sakaradēva-chōḷa-mahārāja bears the characteristic Telugu-Chōḷa praśasti commencing with Charaṇasarōruha etc.

The record is dated the 3rd year of the Chāḷukya-Vikrama era, Kīlaka, Kārttika śu. 10, Thursday. The era is, obviously, a mistake for the Bhūlōkamalla era. If the cyclic year Kīlaka quoted was a mistake for Saumya (which would be the king's third regnal year) the details regularly correspond to 1129 A.D., October 24.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāsrayaṁ
śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāsraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmatbhūlōkamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivriddhi prava
rddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ jayantīpurada nelevīḍinoḷu
sukhasaṁkatāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatvāda padmōpajīvitaru . svasti caraṇa sarōru
havihata viḷōcana triḷōcana pramukhākiḷa prithvīsvaraṁ kārita kāvērī tīra karikāla
kularatna pridīpāhita kumararāṁkusaṁ śrī manmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ bhī
madēvana putra sakaradēva cōḷa mahārājaruṁ manneya mācarasanuṁ cā
ḷukya vikrama variśada 2 neya kīlaka saṁvatsarada kārttika suddha 10 bri
havāradaṁdu naṟavāḍi yaiynūṟaṟa sauḷeppattaṟa baḷiya phaṭika sthā
na kukuvanūru rāmēsvaradēvara Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ pāḷapavitra
dyakkaṁ dēsi pravāsigaḷa Annadānakkaṁ nāyaka lakuma ṇṇa The letter ma is engraved above the line.
dēvara vrittima gaṁḍanagaḍiṁbadōḷutāṁbrasāsanaṁ siḷāsāsana
māgidhārāpūrvvakaṁ Ūriṁ baḍaga kallunaṭṭu Aḷedikkida ma
nigira mattaru 1 ni ge mattaru 6 dēvara nivēdyakkaṁ hiriyakeṟiya
vāḷegadde kamma 225 nandādīvigege biṭṭagāṇa 1 hūvinatōṁṭa 1 Iṁtī
kalnaṭṭu koṭṭaṁta vva dhammagaḷa muṁdē kṣētra bādhegaḷa nondu
manāgalīyade pratipāḷisuvastappa mahāpuruṣargge gaṁge
vāṇarāsiya taḍiyoḷu sahasrakavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ honnalu
kaṭṭisi sāsirvvaruttama brāhmaṇargge kālaṁ ka(ka)rcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ goṭṭa pha
ḷamakku hanneraḍagrahāraṁgaḷa biṭṭa phaḷamakku Adallade I dhammaṁgaḷa
nāvanu kiḍisidarādoḍe gaṁgeya vāṇarāsiya taḍiyoḷu saha
sra kavileya taleyaṁ tanna svahastidiṁda taleyaṁ paṟiyaṟidaṁtapva mahā
brahmētisārggu panneraḍagrahāramanaḷida mahāpātakanakku Aṁta
ppadanaṟidu kaḍalīyade dhammaṁgaḷaṁ pratipāḷisidargge Akṣayaphaḷa
makku . maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ tā yō
harēti vasundharāṁ saṣṭirvvariśa sahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatēkrimi .
Digital edition of SII 27.28 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
